# Task: Add Type Hints

## Objective

Add type hints to all public functions across the three Python files in this
project. The code must pass mypy type checking after the changes.

## Files

- `data_processor.py` — data processing functions (no type hints)
- `text_utils.py` — text utility functions (no type hints)
- `math_helpers.py` — math helper functions (no type hints)
- `mypy.ini` — mypy configuration
- `test_all.py` — tests for all modules

## Requirements

- Add type hints to all public functions (not private/underscore-prefixed)
- Include parameter types and return types
- Code must pass `mypy` with the provided configuration
- All existing tests must still pass
- Do not change the behavior of any function
